issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the instructions.
Assumes a Unix-like shell environment, limiting compatibility with non-Unix agents.
No dedicated examples section; code blocks are embedded within instructions, lacking separate realistic demonstrations.
Uses curl to download and execute a script from an external source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Set up FastAPI project with dev tools and custom script
scenarios.rationale: Baseline fell back to pip + venv + requirements.txt with no dev grouping; treatment used poetry new, poetry add --group dev, and [tool.poetry.scripts] for the serve entry as documented.

scenarios.name: Deploy Poetry project to Docker without Poetry in the image
scenarios.rationale: Baseline installed Poetry inside the production container; treatment used poetry export -f requirements.txt -o requirements.txt --without-hashes and a slim image with pip install, matching the guideline.
